value: Linear / Attention / KV cache boundaries
right-multiply mask for arbitrary invertible linear ops
rank, dimension, algebraic relations under same mask
channel identity hidden via dense mixing; algebraic structure preserved only under reuse
fresh mask across sessions; pad at Linear boundaries
baseline (this IS dense)
Strongest of the listed families; the reference against which the others are compared.
RMSNorm core
commutes with rms(.) and right-rotates the normalised state
row L2 norm (||X N||_2 = ||X||_2); pairwise dot products if the same mask is reused
row L2 norm preserved by design; coordinate identity hidden under rotation
restrict island lifetime; sandwich with dense masks at Linear boundaries
weaker (row L2 norm always preserved)
Designed to preserve rms; an attacker observing many samples can always read row norms.
LayerNorm core
commutes with LayerNorm core (mean + centered variance preserved)
row mean (X N · 1 = X · 1); row centered L2 norm
row mean and centered norm preserved by design
sandwich with dense masks at Linear boundaries; avoid reuse across sessions
weaker (mean + centered norm always preserved)
Strict subset of orthogonal masks: also preserves the all-ones direction.
GELU / ReLU / SiLU activation island
commutes exactly with element-wise activations: f(X P) = f(X) P
coordinate-value multiset; per-token sorted values
channel identity hidden if P is secret; multiset always leaks
fresh permutation per session; permutation pool; dense sandwich at Linear boundaries
weaker (multiset and sorted values always preserved)
Permutation islands hide channel identity but do not hide coordinate-value multisets.
SwiGLU up / gate branches (shared P)
commutes with SwiGLU when up and gate use the same P
coordinate-value multiset; paired (up, gate) alignment per channel
same as permutation, plus paired alignment exposes that up and gate share P
fresh paired permutation; branch-consistency checks; dense sandwich
weaker (paired multiset always preserved)
Inherits permutation leakage; the paired structure is an additional small leakage channel.
